notes:
## 1.7.7

## What's new

- **Faster & steadier** — less “Steady isn’t responding”: lighter Settings scans, slower background ticks, coalesced Home refreshes, parallel icon loads, quieter parent sync.
- **Tighter Settings lock** — tamper repair no longer opens all of Settings. Only Accessibility + Device Admin for a short window. Home-app picker stays gated. About phone / build number treated as dangerous.
- **Honest lockdown** — without Device Owner (ADB / factory setup), Safe Mode, hard uninstall, and factory reset can still escape. With Device Owner on the kid phone, Accessibility and uninstall stay locked.

## Update tip

Install on **both** phones. Kid phone: use Device Owner for real lockdown. Parent: Refresh still works; sync is quieter so the app stays responsive.
